description: Evaluation cases for good modeling practice guidance, routing, and boundary behavior

evals.prompt: I am starting a new agent-based model of household evacuation behavior. What should I do first?
behavior: Begins with problem framing and stakeholder analysis, then identifies early modeling artifacts and review questions

output.description: Begins with problem framing and stakeholder analysis, then identifies early modeling artifacts and review questions

evals.prompt: Can you review my model for reproducibility and tell me what is missing?
behavior: Assesses reproducibility requirements and identifies missing dependencies, provenance, workflow steps, and archive artifacts

output.description: Assesses reproducibility requirements and identifies missing dependencies, provenance, workflow steps, and archive artifacts

evals.prompt: My ABM has uncertainty and I need to document it properly before review.
behavior: Routes to uncertainty-focused guidance and requests parameter, structural, scenario, and calibration ambiguity disclosures

output.description: Routes to uncertainty-focused guidance and requests parameter, structural, scenario, and calibration ambiguity disclosures

evals.prompt: I’m preparing a computational model and journal article for publication. Provide a checklist or to-do list to follow best practices.
behavior: Returns the required deliverables list including ABM-specific ODD documentation

output.description: Returns the required deliverables list including ABM-specific ODD documentation

evals.prompt: This model will inform policy. What governance and participation issues should I check?
behavior: Identifies stakeholder documentation, participation quality, exclusion risks, harms, vulnerable populations, and unresolved disagreements

output.description: Identifies stakeholder documentation, participation quality, exclusion risks, harms, vulnerable populations, and unresolved disagreements

evals.prompt: How do / should I validate my model?
behavior: Warns against overclaiming, distinguishes calibration from validation, and asks for evaluation context plus robustness evidence

output.description: Warns against overclaiming, distinguishes calibration from validation, and asks for evaluation context plus robustness evidence

evals.prompt: Help me structure a full modeling workflow so assumptions, uncertainty, and review criteria are documented from the start.
behavior: Provides lifecycle-oriented modeling guidance with staged objectives, assumptions, uncertainties, artifacts, and review criteria

output.description: Provides lifecycle-oriented modeling guidance with staged objectives, assumptions, uncertainties, artifacts, and review criteria

evals.prompt: I have an existing simulation model and want a self-assessment against good modeling practice before sharing it.
behavior: Runs a structured self-assessment against documented assumptions, uncertainty, provenance, evaluation, and governance expectations

output.description: Runs a structured self-assessment against documented assumptions, uncertainty, provenance, evaluation, and governance expectations

evals.prompt: Is my model ready for publication?
behavior: Does not trigger; publication readiness should route to peer-review

output.description: Does not trigger; publication readiness should route to peer-review

evals.prompt: I need archival metadata and repository packaging for my software release.
behavior: Does not trigger; archival metadata and repository packaging belong to fair4rs

output.description: Does not trigger; archival metadata and repository packaging belong to fair4rs

evals.prompt: Explain what good modeling practice is in one paragraph.
Write a README for my simulation repository.
behavior: Does not trigger; generic documentation task

output.description: Does not trigger; generic documentation task

evals.prompt: Generate an ODD protocol document for my ABM.
behavior: Does not trigger; formal ODD narrative generation belongs to the document skill

output.description: Does not trigger; formal ODD narrative generation belongs to the document skill

evals.prompt: Help me make my simulation more accurate.
behavior: Clarifies purpose, assumptions, evaluation context, and uncertainty before giving modeling-practice guidance

output.description: Clarifies purpose, assumptions, evaluation context, and uncertainty before giving modeling-practice guidance

evals.prompt: Fix grammar in my assumptions document.
My model has no uncertainty analysis or stakeholder record, but I want to claim it supports policy decisions.
behavior: Triggers and flags missing uncertainty and governance requirements as serious deficiencies

output.description: Triggers and flags missing uncertainty and governance requirements as serious deficiencies
